title: CHRISTINA PROJECT - 211info
text: INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES CHRISTINA PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intimate violence education through harm reduction case management, support and advocacy. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Pregnant and parenting youth age 22 and younger who are experiencing or have experienced intimate partner violence Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-6996 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 77, and 75. Near Hollywood Transit Center. Services: Advocacy * Domestic Violence Issues Case/Care Management * Domestic Violence Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Domestic Violence Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ECHO INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMESAFE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEEDS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES
